Meaning.En: The vocal range between bass and tenor, typically sung by men with a voice similar to that of a female contralto but lower in pitch.
Meaning.Example: The choir needed an alto to balance the vocal parts.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả giọng hát nam cao trong dàn hợp xướng hoặc nhạc kịch.
Situation.En: Referring to a male singer who sings in the alto range, often in choral or operatic settings.

Meaning.Vi: nhạc cụ alto (thường chỉ đàn violin alto, hay đàn viola)
Meaning.En: A musical instrument in the alto range, most commonly referring to the viola, especially in orchestral or chamber music contexts.
Meaning.Example: She switched from violin to alto to better fit the string quartet’s texture.

Situation.Vi: Sử dụng trong ngữ cảnh nhạc cụ, đặc biệt là dàn nhạc giao hưởng.
Situation.En: Used when specifying the instrument (e.g., viola) in an ensemble where voice or instrument ranges are categorized as soprano, alto, tenor, bass.
